_description: Total knee replacement (SB — Orthopaedics) at H003 which only has SG and MG empanelled. Phase 2 pre-filters by empanelled_specialties. No SB packages survive the pre-filter. Zero candidates → USP_RECOMMENDED flag.

clinical.chief_complaints: Bilateral knee pain 3 years, severely limiting walking, cannot climb stairs, failed conservative management
clinical.history_of_present_illness: Severe bilateral knee osteoarthritis for 3 years, predominantly right side. Has tried physiotherapy, analgesics, and intra-articular injections with no lasting relief. Orthopaedic surgeon has recommended total knee replacement right side. Patient admitted to this hospital which does not have Orthopaedics empanelment.
clinical.provisional_diagnosis: Bilateral knee osteoarthritis Kellgren-Lawrence Grade 4 — severe

examination_findings.general: Conscious, oriented, ambulant with walking aid
examination_findings.local: Right knee: gross deformity (varus), effusion, crepitus, range of motion 10-80 degrees, severely restricted and painful. Left knee: similar but milder.

investigations.result_summary: Bilateral knee X-ray: Complete joint space obliteration right knee, severe varus deformity, osteophytes, subchondral cysts — KL Grade 4. Left knee KL Grade 3.

clinical.notes: H003 (Sri Venkateswara Hospital) is NOT empanelled for Orthopaedics (SB). Phase 2 will return zero candidates. USP path should be recommended.
